segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: How did Jane receive a letter from a stranger?

translations.zh-Hans: 简是怎样收到一位陌生人的来信的？

segments.text: My daughter, Jane, never dreamed of receiving a letter from a girl of her own age in Holland.

translations.zh-Hans: 我女儿简做梦也没想到会收到荷兰一位同龄女孩的来信。

segments.text: Last year, we were traveling across the channel, and Jane put a piece of paper with her name and address on it into a bottle.

translations.zh-Hans: 去年，我们横渡英吉利海峡时，简把写有自己姓名和地址的一张纸装进瓶子里。

segments.text: She threw the bottle into the sea.
She never thought of it again, but ten months later, she received a letter from a girl in Holland.

translations.zh-Hans: 她再也没想过这件事，但10个月后，她收到了荷兰一个女孩的来信。

segments.text: Both girls write to each other regularly now.

translations.zh-Hans: 现在两个女孩经常互相通信。

segments.text: However, they have decided to use the post office.

translations.zh-Hans: 不过，她们决定使用邮局。

segments.text: It will cost a little more, but they will certainly travel faster.

translations.zh-Hans: 这样会多花一点钱，但信肯定会传得更快。
